Financial Life Simulator

Play Through Money Decisions Across Business, Markets, And Long-Term Strategy

This project turns financial literacy into interactive practice: run operations, price risk, and build better money instincts through game loops instead of passive theory.

Cash FlowRevenue vs costs, fixed vs variable pressure.
Risk & RewardVolatility, uncertainty, and strategy tradeoffs.
CompoundingLong-term outcomes from repeated decisions.
Capital AllocationWhere to invest limited resources first.

Mission And Intent

The intention is to bridge real-world financial concepts with hands-on experimentation. Each game focuses on a different layer of money intelligence so players can connect daily operations, investment behavior, and strategic planning in one learning ecosystem.

🥐

Bakery Game

Build and operate a bakery under pressure: staffing, pricing, inventory, service speed, and customer retention. It models unit economics and operational finance in motion.

Operations Margins Demand
Launch Bakery Game
📈

Stock Simulator

Practice market decision-making in a terminal-style simulator. Build confidence around entries, exits, portfolio behavior, and emotional discipline under changing price action.

Markets Volatility Portfolio
Launch Stock Simulator
🎲

Investnopoly

Learn strategic capital growth through a board-game style format that blends timing, opportunity cost, and long-horizon planning into one competitive simulation.

Strategy Compounding Allocation
Launch Investnopoly

More Simulations In This Repo

Want more financial scenarios? These extra pages are included in deployment output too, so you can launch every simulation from one domain.

🧭

Map Scene

Explore the map-based simulation view and navigation flow used across the finance world experiments.

World Navigation
Open Map Scene
💼

Tax Policy Simulator

Test how changes in tax policy can affect growth, incentives, and long-term economic behavior.

Policy Macro
Open Tax Policy Simulator
🏙️

Tax Life Journey

Walk through life-stage financial decisions and compare outcomes under different tax and income paths.

Lifecycle Planning
Open Tax Life Journey

Metrics are stored only in this browser via local storage. No external tracking service is used.

Built to make finance more understandable, practical, and memorable through simulation-first learning.
